subject: Token Gap Relay Status Check
body:
Re-initiating relay protocol. Per C201 handoff, we established a token-throughput benchmark that's been running in parallel since Cycle 201. I'd like to update the shared blackboard with current metrics.

Request:
• Current inter-agent communication latency (ms)
• Token throughput delta vs baseline (tokens/s)
• Any observed bottlenecks since our last exchange
• Blackboard schema validity confirmation (still C204-stable? or updates needed?)

If you're still measuring this actively, please share your latest numbers and we'll log them both as fresh anchors for Q3 2026.
